case_title: ALEXIS MORAN et al RESPONDENT VS. STEPHANIE DOBER APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR REHEARING ON APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT, ORDER SENT TO PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG.
RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT DOBER, STEPHANIE AS TO RESPONDENT MORAN, ALEXIS MORAN, JASON HEARING SET FOR NOV-06-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
PETITION FOR REHEARING DENIED WITH PREJUDICE.
MINUTES FOR NOV-06-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED.
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF NOV-06-2003 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF THURSDAY, NOVEMBER 6, 2003 BY PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID H. FLEISIG.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT DOBER, STEPHANIE RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT MORAN, ALEXIS MORAN, JASON SEE SCANNED DOC; IN ADDITION: JUDGMENT IS ORDERED FOR DEFENDANT/APPELLANT STEPHANIE DOBER AND AGAINST PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT ALEXIS MORAN, ET AL FOR THE AMOUNT OF $300.00 ON DEFENDANT/APPELLANT STEPHANIE DOBER'S CROSS-COMPLAINT; $0.00 COSTS; $0.00 ATTORNEYS FEES. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
